---
name: "Yuze Li [Advised by Ali Butt]"
date: 2023-08-01
period: "PhD: Fall 2023 – Spring 2026"
topic: "Cross-stack Improvement on Memory Efﬁciency"
website: "https://people.cs.vt.edu/lyuze/"
position: Moore Threads
publications:
  - venue: "VMIL 2025"
    path: "publications/workshop/2025vmil.html"
  - venue: "ECOOP 2026"
    path: "publications/conference/2026ecoop.html"
---
